name: Marion Ryder (MOB)
text: Planning a wedding is hectic enough but, planning a surprise wedding for your daughter and future son-in-law (who live in England) to take place at Disney World is nothing short of amazing. Thank you for your support and beautiful ceremony. We could not have pulled it off without you.

name: Olympia & Philip Lee
text: From the moment we first spoke to you, we knew you were exactly the person we were looking for to marry us… you were charismatic, humorous and sincere. Our wedding ceremony was just as we had pictured it… romantic, emotional and memorable. Thank You… for making our “dream” come true!

name: Winston & Cherie Greer
text: After speaking with you for the first time I felt very comfortable and it felt as if you were an old friend of the family. You told us not to worry about a thing and that you would take care of us. You most certainly did. Your kind words touched our hearts in a way that we will never forget. You personify the Ritz Carlton standard of excellence. We will cherish your words forever.

name: Tami & Jeremy Corday
text: Our wedding was staged ocean-front in Sarasota, Florida... Reverend Miller's personality and presence was a perfect fit for our special occasion. His enthusiasm, flexibility, and genuine care really helped to make our wedding ceremony one of the most amazing memories of our life!
